info.powderedup.bat_bottle: Right click on a bat with an empty bottle to capture it, similar to a bucket with fish.
info.powderedup.guano: Guano is obtained via the shoveling of guano layers.
info.powderedup.guano_layer: Guano layers can be found in caves as well as from when bats excrete randomly.
info.powderedup.saltpeter: Saltpeter is obtained from washing guano in water in a cauldron.
message.powderedup.no_charges_found: No linked charges found within range.
tooltip.powderedup.charge_detonator.summ: Remote detonator for linked charges. Activating it primes linked explosives after a tune delay.
tooltip.powderedup.deadmans_switch.summa: Keep holding to stay safe. Releasing it primes linked charges almost immediately.
tooltip.powderedup.hidden_mine.summary: Concealed proximity mine. Hidden from non-owners and armed to punish close movement.
tooltip.powderedup.incendiary.summary: Thermite grenade: ramps up, melts iron, ignites nearby blocks, and burns nearby entities in pulses.
tooltip.powderedup.laser_detonator.summa: Hold to aim, release to laser-pick a visible charge and remotely prime it.
tooltip.powderedup.laser_mine.summary: Arms after placement and projects a trip laser. Crossing the beam triggers detonation.
tooltip.powderedup.mimic_charge.summary: Rigged decoy explosive disguised as another item. Non-owner handling triggers detonation.
tooltip.powderedup.molotov.summary: Impact firebomb that bursts glass and rapidly spreads fire outward. Fizzles in water.
tooltip.powderedup.nail_bomb.summary: Shrapnel grenade that bursts nails outward on detonation for lethal close-range area damage.
tooltip.powderedup.pipe_bomb.summary: Bouncy grenade explosive with impact physics and delayed detonation.
tooltip.powderedup.shaped_charge.summary: Focused sticky charge for directional breaching and tighter blast placement.
tooltip.powderedup.sticky_charge.summary: Sticky timed charge. Sticks to blocks or entities, then detonates unless linked for manual detonation.
